zotero.abstractNote: We introduce Constant Curvature Graph Convolutional Networks (CCGCNs), a framework for learning on graphs that generalizes Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) to spaces of constant curvature, namely spherical and hyperbolic spaces. We propose a novel approach to perform convolutions in these spaces by leveraging the exponential and logarithmic maps, which allow us to map graph data to and from the tangent space of a manifold. We demonstrate that our approach is effective for node classification and link prediction tasks on various datasets, outperforming Euclidean GCNs and other baselines.
zotero.proceedingsTitle: Proceedings of the 37th International Conference on Machine Learning
